titleStmt.title: SII 38.321: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 321. (A.R. No. 321 of 1912.) KARSHAṆAPALLE, PUNGANUR TALUK, CHITTOOR DISTRICT. On the east and north bases of the maṇḍapa infront of the central shrine, Arkēśvarasvāmi temple.

summary.p: This begins with the meykīrtti of the ruler, kō-Vīrapāṇḍyaṉ talaiyum etc.,

Records the remission of tax (suṅgam) levied on every oil-mill of the village inorder to maintain a lamp to the god Aṅgak-kāraīśvaram-uḍaiyār, of the village, Muttukkūr alias Eṟivīrappaṭṭaṇam in Puli-nāḍu in Tyāgāvaraṇa-vaḷanāḍu (a subdivision) of Jayaṅgoṇḍachōḻa-maṇḍalam, by (an revenue official) Suṅgam-uḍaiya Chōḻakulakāraṇa mūvēndavēḷāṉ, for the welfare of the king (chakravatti śrī bhujaṁvaṟtikka).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
kovirapāṇṭiyaṉ talaiyum ceralaṉ cālaiyum Ilaṅkaiyum Iraṭṭapāṭi Eḻaraiyilakkamuṅkoṇṭu kalliyāṇapurattu vijaiya Abhiṣekañceytu virasiṁhāsaṉattu viṟṟiruntaruḷiya kovirājakesari Eṉlāki Eṇṭicai niṟainta kirtti Uṭaiyār śrī rājādhirājadevaṟku yāṇṭu muppattāṟāvatu jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻamaṇṭalattut tiyākāvaraṇavaḷanāṭṭup pulināṭṭu muttukkūrāṉa Eṟivirappaṭṭaṇattu Aṅgakkāṟa Īśvaramuṭaiyārkku Ivvūr cekku Onṟināl cuṅkattāl Eṇ
ṇai kūṭṭi Itdevarkku tiruviḷakku Erikka cakkiravatti śrībhujaṅvaṟtikka cuṅkamuṭaiya coḻakulakāraṇamuven=taveḷāṉ viṭṭāṉ Itiṉai Aḻittāṉ kavilaiyum kaṉṟaiyum Aḻitta pāvattil paṭuvān .
Digital edition of SII 38.321 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
